content.text:
good morning — hope the coffee's still hot.

one thing worth a note this week: juno's 4-year checkup is coming up in about three weeks. it's a good one — typically includes a vision and hearing screen, a few catch-up vaccines, and a chance to ask anything on your mind. worth calling your pediatric office soon to snag a slot before summer fills up.

nothing new surfaced in the local village feed this week, and wren is just along for the ride in this one. that's all — a quiet sunday to you.
